policySections.title: 1. Use of the Platform
policySections.introductiveText: You may use our platform to:
listItems: Create an account as a user or seller
policySections.conclusionText: You agree to provide accurate information and to use the platform lawfully.

policySections.title: 2. Accounts and Security
policySections.introductiveText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities under your account. Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized use.

policySections.title: 3. Seller Terms
listItems: Provide accurate product descriptions and pricing
Comply with local laws and regulations
Not sell prohibited items (e.g., illegal goods, dangerous products)
policySections.conclusionText: We reserve the right to remove any listings that violate our policies.

policySections.title: 4. Orders and Payments
listItems: Users agree to pay the listed price, including any taxes or shipping.
All payments are processed securely via our third-party payment provider.
Refunds and cancellations may be handled according to the seller's return policy and local consumer laws.

policySections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
policySections.introductiveText: All content on the platform (e.g., logos, UI, product listings) is the property of Green & Quick or its respective owners. Users may not copy, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the platform without permission.

policySections.title: 6. Prohibited Conduct
listItems: Use the platform for fraudulent or illegal activities
Interfere with the platform's security or functionality
policySections.conclusionText: Violations may result in account suspension or legal action.

policySections.title: 7. Disclaimer and Limitation of Liability
policySections.introductiveText: We provide the platform "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for:
listItems: Delays, errors, or interruptions in service
Damages resulting from use of the platform

policySections.title: 8. Termination
policySections.introductiveText: We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these terms. You may also delete your account at any time.

policySections.title: 9. Governing Law
policySections.introductiveText: These Terms are governed by the laws of the European Union. Disputes will be resolved in the courts of EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

policySections.title: 10. Changes to These Terms
policySections.introductiveText: We may revise these terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
